_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Coordinate technical support to enterprise-wide cybersecurity defense technicians
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain AI security standards for the enterprise, including training data provenance requirements, model registry controls, and LLM application security requirements.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI SP domain. Task SP-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-A-003 (SP, cosine: 0.484), TF-S-011 (TF, cosine: 0.468).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.7/10 (raw 0.465). Shared vocabulary: [enterprise]. NICE-only terms [coordinate, cybersecurity, defense, support, technical, technicians] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, application, controls, data, develop, llm] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.867 (P=0.883, R=0.852). P exceeds R by 0.031 — the NICE element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.5%). "Coordinate technical support to enterprise-wide cybersecurity defense technician" and "Develop and maintain AI security standards for the enterprise, including trainin" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.510 ≈ STS 0.465 (gap 0.045). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [enterprise] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.7%. Shared tokens: [enterprise]. NICE-only: [coordinate, cybersecurity, defense, support, technical, technicians]. WIDAI-only: [ai, application, controls, data, develop, llm].
